title: Magic Eater destroys all opponent-side magic cards

card.rawText: Destroy all magic cards on opponents side of the field.

effect.target: All magic cards on opponent's side of the field

plan.title: Magic Eater destroys all opponent-side magic cards
plan.summary: Play Magic Eater with magic on both fields and verify only the opponent's field magic is destroyed.

notes: Player_1 keeps test_magic_spd_plus4 on their own field as the non-destroyed control.
Player_2 has two magic cards on field as Magic Eater's opponent-side targets.

steps: Inspect both players' magic slots and cemeteries.

expectedAssertions.label: Magic Eater goes to cemetery after resolution

manualVerification: Confirm Magic Eater does not destroy the controller's own field magic.
riskNotes: This covers opponent-side filtering for destroy-all magic.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Magic Eater's opponent-side destroy-all effect.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
